$comment: Maps Playwright screenshot names (from toHaveScreenshot('NAME.png')) to doc image destinations under the repo's assets/img/ tree. `npm run sync-docs` copies the standalone-chromium baselines to these paths so committed doc images stay in sync with regression baselines. Paths are repo-relative. CONFIRM these against the real docs before committing regenerated images — some doc images are dark-mode or multi-step variants this POC does not capture.
